text: Prior to loading bulk cargo the holds should be

options.text: Cleaned and all the dunnage piled up in one section of the hold
Cleaned in all respects for the next cargo
Swept clean and all sweepings put in the bilges
Cleaned with the bilge cover kept open

explanation: Before loading bulk cargo, cargo holds must be thoroughly cleaned and prepared to ensure the cargo's integrity and to prevent contamination. All residues must be removed, and the holds must be in a suitable condition for the specific cargo being loaded.
